zh.Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Haselwood於1444年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾時，他的父親Thomas Haselwood23歲，母親Joan Irwin23歲。他於大約1476年與Christiana Huett在英國諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1507年12月22日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Haselwood于1444年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾时，他的父亲Thomas Haselwood23岁，母亲Joan Irwin23岁。他于大约1476年与Christiana Huett在英国諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1507年12月22日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Haselwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hazelwood
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hazlewood (Suffolk, Surrey, Devon, Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Shropshire), named with Old English hæsel ‘hazel’ + wudu ‘wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Haselwood was born in 1444, in Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Thomas Haselwood, was 23 and his mother, Joan Irwin, was 23. He married Christiana Huett about 1476, in Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 December 1507, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Saint Margaret, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Haselwood est né en 1444, à Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Haselwood, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Irwin, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Huett environ 1476, à Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1507, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Margaret, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Margaret Church, Northampton, England: Saint Margaret, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Haselwood 1444 in Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Haselwood 23 und seine Mutter Joan Irwin 23. Er hat um 1476 in Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England Christiana Huett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1507 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Saint Margaret, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Christiana Huett circa 1476, nel Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 dicembre 1507, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Margaret, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Haselwoodが1444年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアメイドウエルで生まれた時，父Thomas Haselwoodは23歳，母Joan Irwinは23歳であった。約1476年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアメイドウエルでChristiana Huettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1507年12月22日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクサイント マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Haselwood(이)가 1444년 영국 노르섬프토실르 메이드웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Haselwood(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Irwin(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1476년 영국 노르섬프토실르 메이드웰에서 Christiana Huett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 12월 22일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 세인트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Haselwood nasceu em 1444, em Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Haselwood, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan Irwin, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana Huett aproximadamente 1476, em Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1507, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.St Margaret Church, Northampton, England: Saint Margaret, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Haselwood родился в 1444 г. в местности меидвелл, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Haselwood было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Irwin, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Huett около 1476 г. в местности меидвелл, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 декабря 1507 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1507, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
